nodes.name: FramerTextElementFetcher
nodes.description: Fetch text component from Framer workspace, validate workspace ownership

nodes.name: TextVariantResolver
nodes.description: Resolve text variant from FREEDOM config, map to canonical font size

nodes.name: OverrideResolver
nodes.description: Apply component overrides (delta-style changes) to base component

nodes.name: StyleResolutionEngine
nodes.description: Combine base style + overrides into final resolved style

nodes.name: AnimationMetadataExcluder
nodes.description: Detect and exclude animation metadata, record in audit index

nodes.name: WorkspaceScopedAggregator
nodes.description: Aggregate all element data with workspaceId context

nodes.name: ExportValidationGate
nodes.description: Validate all transformations complete, emit TextElementFetched

nodes.name: OutboxPublisher
nodes.description: Emit CloudEvents to queue fabric after all storage (DNA-8 outbox)
